hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-semibold

layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard (p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12). Generous padding for containers.
layout.applicant_dashboard: Top Navigation (Crystal Glassmorphism) + Centered Main Content Container (max-w-7xl)
layout.hr_dashboard: Modern Sidebar (fixed, w-64, border-r) + Main Content Area

timeline.style: Horizontal animated step progress. Connected by a line.
timeline.active_state: Pulsing ring or shadow, brightly colored icon.

cards.style: Clean modern, bg-white, border border-slate-200, shadow-sm, rounded-xl.

buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-lg

tables.style: Clean, border-collapse, subtle gray header backgrounds (bg-slate-50). Data-testid required for rows/cells.

forms.inputs: Shadcn input style, border-slate-200, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900 focus:border-slate-900

motion.timeline_progress: Framer motion for width growth on progress bar, staggered entrance for timeline nodes.
motion.page_transition: Fade in and slide up slightly (opacity 0 -> 1, y 10 -> 0)

backgrounds.description: Professional office building for login page background

instructions_to_main_agent.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
instructions_to_main_agent.implementation_notes: Use Shadcn components heavily for the HR dashboard (tables, forms, dialogs, dropdowns). For the Applicant dashboard, create a custom horizontal timeline using framer-motion. Keep the design clean, high-contrast, and professional (like BUMN or large enterprises). Avoid dark mode unless explicitly toggled, default to light mode.
